title: Gensokyo Delight ~ Youkais' Feasts
description: Add a variety of Japanese style food, drink, and culinary utensils. Provides immersive cooking experience with 143+ food, including 31 placeable food.
body:
Discord: https://discord.gg/BCHNhsDMXz

Content in this mod is a subset of [Youkais' Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming). You cannot have both mods in the same pack. 

Required Dependency: Farmer's Delight

 

📦 New Additions

New Food:

This mod has 143+ food:

- 31 kinds of edible ingredients
- 34 kinds of simple food
- 31 kinds of placeable food, including soup, pot, plate, feast, and cakes
- 18 kinds of sushi, including nigiri, maki, and rolls
- 29 kinds of drinks, including tea, sake, and wine.

New Culinary Utensils:

- Small iron pot / Short pot / Stockpot: Immersive cooking. The pot turns into food block on completion.
- Steamer: Bulk steaming many items at once
- Cuisine Board: Immersive food crafting. Visualize how sushi is made with steps
- Ingredient Rack: Make ingredients readily available when you are using cuisine board or pots.
- Fermentation tank: To make soy sauce, sake, and wine
- Kettle: Brew tea
- Basin: Squeeze grape juice
- Drying rack: Dry tea leaves and some other items

New Crops:

- Red beans: Can be found in birch forests, bamboo jungle, and sunflower plains. Plantable only on clay, mud, or coarse dirt.
- Soybeans: Can be found in the dark forest, jungle, and swamp.
- Tea: Can be found in flower forest, meadow, groves, and on mountains.
- Cucumber: Can be found in coniferous biomes (biomes with spruce).
- Grape: Can be found in forests
- Udumbara: can be found in swamp. Grows under moonlight and shrinks under sunlight. Flowers for very short period of time only under full moon.

New Animals:

- Lampery: Can be found in rivers and oceans
- Crab: Can be found in swamps, rivers, and beach
- Tuna: Can be found in deep oceans
- Deer: can be found in sakura forest, a biome added by this mod
